document_info.document_type: Fleet vehicle, driver, and MVR schedule

positives: Complete vehicle schedule provided with VINs for all 37 units.
All 24 listed power units are model years 2021-2024.
Complete driver roster and MVR summary provided for 40 drivers; 22 drivers have 20+ years of listed experience.
concerns: MVR summary shows only 5 Clear drivers; 32 drivers are listed with Minor Violations, 2 with Major Violations, and 1 with Accident status.
33 of 40 drivers show at least 1 accident on the MVR worksheet, including 7 drivers with 2 accidents.
Two drivers with Major Violations each show 3 violations and 2 accidents.
One driver has only 4 years of experience, and the trailer fleet includes older 2015 and 2017 units.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: No separate loss runs were provided. The MVR worksheet totals 39 violations and 40 accidents across 40 listed drivers; the reporting period was not stated.
